title: Newsletter: Sign Up For The Latest Updates
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The average age of assisted living residents is nearly 87 years old.",
    "69% of assisted living residents need help walking.",
    "30% of assisted living residents have Alzheimer’s or some form of dementia.",
    "The high needs of the senior population require stable and safe housing to ensure consistent access to care and resources.",
    "SB 433 creates an income-based cap to room and board rates at Residential Care Facilities for the Elderly (RCFEs).",
    "SB 433 allows all Medi-Cal assisted living program participants to keep the same personal needs allowance as SSI recipients, which is $179 in 2025.",
    "Currently, an RCFE can charge non-SSI Medi-Cal assisted living program participants any amount for room and board, potentially exceeding the person’s monthly income.",
    "SB 433 aims to protect California’s low-income, disabled, and aging population from displacement.",
    "SB 435 addresses the growing threat that prolonged power outages present to vulnerable assisted living residents.",
    "Climate change is increasing the risks of wildfires, heatwaves, and extreme weather conditions, leading to power outages in assisted living facilities.",
    "The lack of backup power in assisted living facilities puts residents' lives in danger and over-burdens first responders.",
    "Without backup power, residents face preventable risks such as loss of ventilation, air conditioning, lighting, and access to life-saving medical devices."
  ]
}
```
